fallback_contact.name: Rudy Penner
fallback_contact.title: President, CIC Inc.
fallback_contact.rationale: Small (~10 employees, ~$1.9M revenue) GC; Rudy is the principal. CIC has an Estimator/Project Manager combined role per their team structure. With the size, the President is likely involved in bid decisions directly. CIC specializes in restaurant + commercial GC with 30+ years history — high-frequency repeat-paint work (chain rollouts). Office: 865 Wall St, Winnipeg, MB R3G 2T9. Phone: 204-988-2199.

needs_review_flags: Estimator role is combined with PM — fetch cic-inc.ca/meet-our-team-employees/ manually to identify current Estimator/PM names
Restaurant focus = lots of franchise/chain work — Ashrah should mention any restaurant-chain refinish experience
personalization_hooks: 30+ years in restaurant + commercial — chain franchise work means recurring paint scopes (refresh cycles)
Small firm, owner-led decision-making — quick bid-list moves
Pitch the 5:30 PM auto-report angle — restaurant clients are demanding on schedule and presentation; CIC will value a sub that handles that paperwork itself
Post-job professional cleaning is HUGE for restaurants reopening to customers — lead with that

sources.claim: Team structure includes Estimator/PM combined role
